# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
    BucketName: ### CloudFormation parameter - S3 bucket name, e.g., myappbucket  
        Type: AWS::S3::Bucket  // Define a new Amazon S3 resource of type "AWS::S3::Bucket" named MyAppBucket in the current stack and set it as Base Bucket for more granular policies if required by your application. Required By IAM roles
        Properties:
            #### AWS CloudFormation Property - The name or reason why you can’t rename this bucket to avoid confusion, e.g., “backup”   // This is the logical ID of our S3 Bucket (required)   
            LogicalID: MyAppBucketLogicalId     // Specify a unique physical log id for resource definition if needed by next iteration on lifecycle policy or access policies as required in later stages.
